title: jurinea frigida
intro: Jurinea frigida, also known as the cold Jurinea or Jurinea frigida, is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family and is native to the mountainous regions of China and India. The medicinal properties of Jurinea frigida include its anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects, which have been attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. This plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, and has been found to exhibit antioxidant, antibacterial, and antiviral activities, offering potential health benefits such as reduced inflammation, improved immune function, and enhanced overall well-being. Jurinea frigida can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to support the body's natural healing processes.
